name_cn:
◽Kate 99 ◽
When it comes to the hottest bags of these past two years, the shoulder bag must be mentioned! Carried with a thin strap, the bag sits perfectly under the arm, freeing your hands and making your arms look longer and more free. Carrying this small bag creates a seamless look with your outfit, giving off a carefree French elegance that makes you look effortlessly stylish. It also comes with a long leather strap for different carrying styles! One bag, multiple uses! Model S08043, Size: 26x13.5x4.5cm
